subcodes.first_line: O noble Sire and distinguished Presence! The servant hath attained unto thy verses, and I beseech the Most High that He may cause them to prosper [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سید الجلیل و الحضره النبیل قد فاز الخادم بنظمکم و اسئله تعالی بان یصلح به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
